examples: Eryngo: any of several plants of the genus eryngium having spiny leaves and dense clusters of small bluish flowers.
A European seashore plant (Eryngium maritimum) having prickly, fleshy, bluish leaves and heads of blue or purplish flowers.
Some of his favorites include Rattlesnake Master (Eryngium yuccifolium) and Prairie Blazing Star (Liatris pycnostachya).
